entries.description: Read project-guidance.md, lessons-learned.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md, spec.md
Wrote session-state.json marking session 1 in-progress
Created ai-router/queue_db.py: SQLite schema (messages, follow_ups), WAL mode, QueueDB class with enqueue/claim/heartbeat/complete/fail/reclaim_expired and read helpers

Created ai-router/tests/test_queue_db.py with 23 unit tests covering all spec acceptance criteria; added pytest.ini with import-mode=importlib (hyphenated ai-router/ otherwise breaks pytest collection)
pytest: 23 passed in 0.36s
End-of-session verification routed via gpt-5-4
Applied fixes for verifier-flagged issues 1, 2, 3 from round 1; pytest 25/25 green.
End-of-session verification (round 2) routed via gpt-5-4
End-of-session verification (round 3, final retry) routed via gpt-5-4
Removed PRAGMA synchronous=NORMAL override; added regression test asserting synchronous >= FULL. pytest 41/41 green.
Read project-guidance.md, lessons-learned.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md, spec.md; confirmed Session 1 complete with all 3 verification rounds resolved.
Wrote session-state.json marking session 2 in-progress (currentSession=2, status=in-progress, orchestrator=claude-opus-4-7@high).

Per durable user instruction (memory: feedback_ai_router_usage), router calls are restricted to end-of-session verification only; Step 3.5 routed ai-assignment.md authoring intentionally skipped (Session 1 also skipped it, so this stays consistent).

Extended queue_db.py: FollowUp dataclass; QueueDB.add_follow_up()/read_follow_ups()/count_follow_ups(); MaxFollowUpRoundsExceeded with default rounds=3; on overflow, message transitioned to state='failed' with reason='max_followup_rounds_exceeded' (no attempts bump; terminal states left alone). Two-phase commit-then-raise pattern keeps the failure transition durable.

Added export_jsonl()/export_jsonl_to_path()/import_jsonl()/import_jsonl_from_path() and an argparse-based main() exposing 'export-jsonl' and 'import-jsonl' subcommands. Export is deterministic (sort_keys + compact separators, message-then-its-followups grouping). Import refuses non-empty target via ImportNotAllowedError (recovery semantics, not merge).

Created ai-router/tests/test_queue_followups.py with 21 unit tests covering round-trip, max-rounds default + custom + zero, overflow does-not-bump-attempts, terminal-state preservation, deterministic export, decoded payload/result, full export-then-import round-trip, refuse non-empty target, blank/comment line handling, unknown record type rejection, CLI via main(), CLI via subprocess. pytest: 64/64 passed (23 from session 1 + 21 from session 2 + 20 parametric variants).
End-of-session verification routed via gpt-5-4
Per durable user instruction (memory: feedback_ai_router_usage), routed next-orchestrator recommendation skipped — router is restricted to end-of-session verification only this session.

Read project-guidance.md, lessons-learned.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md, spec.md; reviewed prior session reviews and activity log; user instructed router restricted to end-of-session verification only.
Wrote session-state.json marking session 3 in-progress (currentSession=3, status=in-progress, orchestrator=claude-code/claude-opus-4-7@high).
Per durable user instruction (memory: feedback_ai_router_usage), routed ai-assignment.md authoring intentionally skipped; sessions 1 and 2 also skipped this for consistency.

Bumped session-state schema to v2; added SessionLifecycleState enum (work_in_progress/work_verified/closeout_pending/closeout_blocked/closed); register_session_start now writes lifecycleState alongside legacy 'status' for backward compat; mark_session_complete migrates v1 in-memory then rewrites as v2; read_session_state lazily migrates without rewriting; unknown v1 status falls back to work_in_progress.

Added NextOrchestratorReason and NextOrchestrator dataclasses with 4 reason codes (continue-current-trajectory|switch-due-to-blocker|switch-due-to-cost|other) and 30-char specifics minimum; validate_next_orchestrator() returns (passed, errors[]) with agent-readable messages, accepts both dataclass and dict input.

Added ModeConfig dataclass (outsource_mode/orchestrator_role/verifier_role); parse_mode_config extracts the 'Session Set Configuration' YAML block from spec.md (fenced or unfenced, yaml/yml labels); read_mode_config loads from a session-set dir; validate_mode_config requires distinct roles when outsourceMode=last; tiebreakerFallback field deferred per spec — accepted in YAML but not surfaced as a config attribute.
Re-exported SessionLifecycleState/NextOrchestrator/NextOrchestratorReason/ModeConfig and the validate/read/parse helpers from ai-router/__init__.py.

Created ai-router/tests/test_session_state_v2.py with 49 tests across enum membership, register/mark v2 writes, v1->v2 lazy migration (in-progress->work_in_progress, complete->closed, file untouched on read, rewritten on next write), malformed input handling, NextOrchestrator validator pass/fail paths (missing fields, unknown reason codes, short specifics, whitespace-only specifics, exact-min boundary, dict form, non-dataclass-non-dict), mode config parsing (defaults, fenced/unfenced/yml-label/malformed YAML, tiebreakerFallback ignored, unknown values), validation (first vs last, distinct-roles requirement), and a real-world parse against the live set-001 spec.md.
pytest: 113/113 passed (64 prior + 49 new) in 2.41s.
End-of-session verification routed via gpt-5-4

Applied fixes for verifier-flagged minor issues 1, 2, 3 from round 1: (1) NextOrchestratorReason.code now uses Literal alias instead of plain str; (2) _extract_session_set_configuration_block bounds fence search to the configuration section so later YAML fences cannot be misread; (3) UTF-8 BOM stripped before heading regex match. Added 3 regression tests. pytest 116/116 green.
End-of-session verification (round 2) routed via gpt-5-4

Reordered _extract_session_set_configuration_block to find the fence first, then compare position to the section terminator — internal `# comment` and `---` lines inside the fence body no longer truncate the section. Added 2 regression tests. pytest 118/118 green.
End-of-session verification (round 3) routed via gpt-5-4

Round 3 acceptance criteria all PASS (7/7). Two minor edge-case issues fixed without a 4th verification round (max-2-retries reached): (a) parse_mode_config no longer coerces invalid values — they pass through and validate_mode_config flags them; (b) yaml-labeled fences are preferred over unlabeled fences in the configuration section. Added 4 regression tests. pytest 120/120 green.
Per durable user instruction (memory: feedback_ai_router_usage), routed next-orchestrator recommendation skipped — router is restricted to end-of-session verification only this session.
